description_long: This is a crinkled, rectangular package of Shin Ramyeon instant noodles, featuring a predominantly red and black color scheme. The front of the package displays a large, bold white Korean character with a black outline, accompanied by a photo of a man in a red shirt. The packaging is made of glossy plastic, with visible creases and folds, suggesting it is lightweight and flexible. The sides of the package are thin and show the layered construction of the plastic material. The back of the package contains additional text and branding, with some yellow and white highlights.
description: A crinkled, glossy red and black Shin Ramyeon instant noodle package with bold Korean lettering and a photo of a man on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Korean character, the man's photo, and prominent red and black branding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, crinkled profile and layered plastic construction.
description_view_2: Back view with additional text, branding, and some yellow highlights, less focus on the man's photo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness and crinkled edges of the package.
attribute_brand_logo: A large white Korean character with a black outline, located prominently on the front and back of the package, with 'Shin Ramyeon' text and a photo of a man in a red shirt.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and graphics suggest a spicy flavor, and the word 'ramyeon' is visible, but no explicit flavor text is shown.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A photo of a man in a red shirt is prominently displayed on the front and back, but no special offers or mascots are visible.
